attachment_rule: attach only after a separate Bull or Bear parent root is emitted
attach under Bull only after Bull is separately emitted
attach under Bear only after Bear is separately emitted
attach under Sideways only after Sideways is separately emitted
attach under Crisis only after Crisis is separately emitted
attach as transition context only; parent root must remain explicit
attach under any separately emitted price root as quality context
attach under any separately emitted price root as risk context
emit only from direct event/order-flow/order-lifecycle/social/on-chain rows; never from OHLCV child tags
